user.title: Add iPixel Color LED Matrix
user.description: Choose how to connect to your device.

data_description.scan: Automatically discover nearby iPixel LED matrices via Bluetooth
data_description.manual: Manually enter the Bluetooth MAC address of your device

scan.title: Select Device
scan.description: Found {count} iPixel device(s). Select the one to configure.

manual.title: Manual Configuration
manual.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of your iPixel LED matrix (e.g. AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF).

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the device. Check the address and try again.
error.no_devices_found: No iPixel devices found. Make sure the device is powered on and in range.
